subject: Gaming
title: Ubisoft's Workplace Investigations
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Ubisoft's Workplace Investigations.

hook.text: Multiple Ubisoft executives faced misconduct allegations in 2020. One of gaming's biggest studios was rocked.

buildup.text: Reports emerged of sexual harassment, bullying, and a toxic culture at multiple Ubisoft offices worldwide.

discovery.text: Senior creative directors and HR executives were accused of enabling or ignoring misconduct for years.

twist.text: Ubisoft's CEO apologized and fired some executives. But employees said structural problems remained unfixed.

climax.text: The scandal showed that workplace problems aren't limited to one studio. Systemic issues plague the industry.

punchline.text: Executives fired. Apologies made. Employees said not enough changed.

quiz.question: What did employees say about Ubisoft's response to misconduct allegations?
options: Structural problems remained unfixed despite firings and apologies
